name: Project Milestone Validations
Project Milestone Auto Invoice
script:
for milestone in doc.get("custom_project_milestones", []):
    if milestone.status == "Approved" and not milestone.sales_order:
        so = frappe.new_doc("Sales Order")
        so.customer = doc.customer
        so.company = doc.company
        so.project = doc.name
        so.custom_is_proforma_invoice = 1
        so.delivery_date = milestone.planned_date or frappe.utils.today()

        # Get items from quotation
        if doc.custom_quotation:
            quotation = frappe.get_doc("Quotation", doc.custom_quotation)
            for item in quotation.items:
                item_doc = frappe.get_doc("Item", item.item_code)
                warehouse = None
                if item_doc.is_stock_item:
                    warehouse = frappe.db.get_value("Item Default",
                        {"parent": item.item_code, "company": doc.company},
                        "default_warehouse") or "Stores - SD"
                    actual_qty = frappe.db.get_value("Bin",
                        {"item_code": item.item_code, "warehouse": warehouse},
                        "actual_qty") or 0
                    if actual_qty <= 0:
                        frappe.msgprint(
                            f"Item {item.item_code} is out of stock. Skipping.",
                            indicator="red", title="Out of Stock"
                        )
                        continue
                so.append("items", {
                    "item_code": item.item_code,
                    "item_name": item.item_name,
                    "qty": item.qty,
                    "rate": item.rate,
                    "delivery_date": milestone.planned_date or frappe.utils.today(),
                    "warehouse": warehouse
                })
        else:
            so.append("items", {
                "item_code": "CONSULTING_SVC_MILESTONE",
                "item_name": milestone.milestone_name,
                "qty": 1,
                "rate": milestone.amount,
                "delivery_date": milestone.planned_date or frappe.utils.today()
            })

        so.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        so.submit()
        frappe.db.set_value("Project Milestone", milestone.name, "sales_order", so.name)

    if milestone.status == "Invoiced" and not milestone.invoice_created and milestone.sales_order:
        planned_date = frappe.db.get_value("Project Milestone", milestone.name, "planned_date") or frappe.utils.today()
        si = frappe.new_doc("Sales Invoice")
        si.customer = doc.customer
        si.company = doc.company
        si.project = doc.name
        si.posting_date = planned_date
        si.set_posting_time = 1

        if doc.custom_quotation:
            quotation = frappe.get_doc("Quotation", doc.custom_quotation)
            for item in quotation.items:
                si.append("items", {
                    "item_code": item.item_code,
                    "item_name": item.item_name,
                    "qty": item.qty,
                    "rate": item.rate
                })
        else:
            si.append("items", {
                "item_code": "CONSULTING_SVC_MILESTONE",
                "item_name": milestone.milestone_name,
                "qty": 1,
                "rate": milestone.amount
            })

        si.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        si.submit()
        frappe.db.set_value("Project Milestone", milestone.name, {
            "sales_invoice": si.name,
            "invoice_created": 1
        })
